rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: AppInit DLL Installation

rules.rule_text:
title: AppInit DLL Installation
id: 65e7b868-ebe9-4e8a-b828-3bd2181bc407
status: experimental
description: "One persistence mechanism used by some variations of SmashJacker was\
  \ an AppInit DLL. \nIt would use a reg.exe command to create appropriate Windows\
  \ Registry keys for \npersistence. Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/smashjacker/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1546
- attack.t1546.010
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \reg.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - add
    - AppInit_DLLs
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
